name: wecom-recorder-h5
description: Enterprise WeChat H5 recorder with MP3 storage, TXT transcripts, Tencent ASR and recording QA.

scripts.push:local: dotenv -e ../.env.dev.local -- pnpm exec prisma db push
scripts.migrate:local: dotenv -e ../.env.dev.local -- pnpm exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.reset:local: dotenv -e ../.env.dev.local -- pnpm exec prisma migrate reset
